summary: Complete testing of new commission model (5% added on top, not deducted). All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly. The commission model change from 6% deducted to 5% added is fully implemented.
passed_tests: POST /api/registrations - Returns base_price, service_fee (5%), amount (base + fee)
POST /api/payments/create-checkout - Creates checkout with correct total (base + 5%)
GET /api/admin/payments - Returns totals with total_base_price, total_service_fees, total_stripe_fees, total_platform_net, total_organizer
GET /api/admin/stats - Returns total_service_fees, total_stripe_fees, total_platform_net, total_organizer
Math verification: 35€ base → service_fee=1.75€, total=36.75€, stripe_fee=0.76€, platform_net=0.99€
Math verification: 20€ base → service_fee=1.00€, total=21.00€, stripe_fee=0.54€, platform_net=0.46€
Registration dialog shows fee breakdown: Prix inscription + Frais de service (5%) + Total à payer
Admin Paiements tab shows 'BILAN FINANCIER AUTOMATIQUE' with 5 summary columns
Admin Paiements tab shows 'TABLEAU DE VENTILATION DES PAIEMENTS' with all required columns
Admin payments table has TOTAL footer row with aggregated values
Organizer dashboard shows 100% revenue (470€) - no commission deduction visible
seed_data_creation: Test user test_commission_xxx@test.com created for registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission model is 5% ADDED on top (not deducted). Sophie Test completed payment for 20km race (35€ base → 36.75€ total). Admin dashboard at /admin shows full financial breakdown with BILAN FINANCIER AUTOMATIQUE summary and TABLEAU DE VENTILATION DES PAIEMENTS detailed table. Old transactions (before model change) have 0 for service_fee fields which is expected.

financial_model_summary.commission_rate: 5% ADDED on top of base price

mocked_apis.Stripe: Uses test API key sk_test_emergent - creates real Stripe test checkout sessions
